channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI radiotherapy tool may help eliminate cervical cancer globally
item.description: An AI system effectively plans radiotherapy for cervical and prostate cancer, according to recent study results.

item.title: CDC Issues Hantavirus Guidance, Says Risk Remains Very Low
item.description: Forty-one higher-risk Americans are monitored as labs work to validate PCR tests for detecting infection.

item.title: WHO Annual Assembly Begins Amid Hantavirus and Ebola Crises
item.description: WHO member states meet in Geneva as concerns rise over deadly hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks.

item.title: FDA Approves First Golimumab Biosimilars for RA and UC
item.description: The approvals exclude Simponi and Simponi Aria indications beyond rheumatoid arthritis and ulcerative colitis.
